org.arakhne.neteditor.io.xml

Class AbstractXMLToolReader

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.AbstractNetEditorReader
      • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.xml.AbstractXMLToolReader
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    NetEditorReader
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    AbstractGMLReader, AbstractXMLReader, GMLReader, GraphMLReader, GXLReader

    public abstract class AbstractXMLToolReader
extends AbstractNetEditorReader
    Abstract implementation of a NetEditor reader that provides XML tools. This class provides basic tools to parse XML nodes. It does not provides any abstract implementation of the parser.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:04
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-io

    • Method Detail

      • extractNodeNoFail

        protected static Element extractNodeNoFail(Node parent,
                        String name)
        Replies the child element in the specified parent and with the specified name. This functions returns null when the node was not found.
        Parameters:
        parent - is the node in which the child should be.
        name - is the name of the node to reply.
        Returns:
        the node.
        See Also:
        extractNode(Node, String)

      • extractNode

        protected static Element extractNode(Node parent,
                  String name)
                              throws IOException
        Replies the child element in the specified parent and with the specified name. This function throws an exception when the not was not found.
        Parameters:
        parent - is the node in which the child should be.
        name - is the name of the node to reply.
        Returns:
        the node.
        Throws:
        IOException - when the node was not found.
        See Also:
        extractNodeNoFail(Node, String)

      • extractType

        protected abstract String extractType(Element node)
                               throws IOException
        Extract the type of the specified node as a string.
        Parameters:
        node - is the node to explore
        Returns:
        the type of the node, never null.
        Throws:
        IOException

      • extractTypeClass

        protected final Class<?> extractTypeClass(Element node)
                                   throws IOException
        Extract the type of the specified node as a class.
        Parameters:
        node - is the node to explore
        Returns:
        the type of the node, never null.
        Throws:
        IOException

      • createInstance

        protected final <T> T createInstance(Class<T> type,
                   Element node)
                          throws IOException
        Extract the type of a node and create the corresponding instance.
        Parameters:
        type - is the expected type of the new instance.
        node - is the node from which the type should be extracted.
        Returns:
        the new instance.
        Throws:
        IOException

      • createFigureInstance

        protected final <T extends ViewComponent> T createFigureInstance(Class<T> type,
                                               Element node,
                                               UUID viewId)
                                                      throws IOException
        Extract the type of a node and create the corresponding instance.
        Parameters:
        type - is the expected type of the new instance.
        node - is the node from which the type should be extracted.
        viewId - is the identifier of the view.
        Returns:
        the new instance.
        Throws:
        IOException

      • isGraphModel

        protected final boolean isGraphModel(Element node)
                              throws IOException
        Replies if the specified node is the node for a graph model.
        Parameters:
        node - is the node to test.
        Returns:
        true if the specified node contains a graph model; otherwise false.
        Throws:
        IOException

      • parseUUID

        protected static UUID parseUUID(String str)
        Parse the given string to obtain an UUID. This function never throws an exception when the given string cannot be parsed. It returns a null value in this case
        Parameters:
        str -
        Returns:
        the UUID or null if the given string cannot be parsed.
        See Also:
        enforceUUID(String)

      • enforceUUID

        protected static UUID enforceUUID(String str)
                           throws IOException
        Parse the given string to obtain an UUID. This function throws an exception when the given string cannot be parsed.
        Parameters:
        str -
        Returns:
        the UUID, never null.
        Throws:
        IOException
        See Also:
        parseUUID(String)
